notes:
- Auto-update no longer pops a "Failed to load Python DLL" error dialog mid-update. The installer was relaunching the app twice at the end of every update and the doomed duplicate threw that dialog - harmless, but scary. Now there's exactly one relaunch. Heads up: you'll see the dialog ONE last time on this very update (the old version's updater runs it) - just click OK; from then on it's gone.
- Updates window: long release notes now scroll instead of getting cut off, and the Refresh button no longer clips.
- New "Update history" button next to Check for updates - see what every past version changed.

App-only update: no "Update Bridge Payload" step.
